title: Alternative platelet differentiation pathways initiated by non-hierarchically related hematopoietic stem cells
author: Woll, Petter S
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.title: Filename "final_analysis_2.R"
steps.instruction: Filename "final_analysis_2.R": Analysis scripts in R used for processing of raw and metadata deposited on ArrayExpress accession ID E-MTAB-

steps.title: Filename "sce_obj_zenodo_240408.RData"
steps.instruction: Filename "sce_obj_zenodo_240408.RData": single cell objects containing normalized counts, index sorting data, dimensionality reductions, pseudotime and additional variables utilized to generate RNA sequencing figures associated with the manuscript. Related to raw and metadate deposited on ArrayExpress accession ID E-MTAB-

steps.title: Filenames "batch_bc1
steps.instruction: Filenames "batch_bc1.txt", "batch_bc2.txt" and "batch_bc3.txt": barcode files for zUMIs for each sequencing batch used for analysis of raw and metadata deposited on ArrayExpress accession ID E-MTAB-

steps.title: Filename "process_scRNAseq_data_fig_S3.R"
steps.instruction: Filename "process_scRNAseq_data_fig_S3.R": Analysis script in R applied to Python h5ad format single cell RNA sequencing data file (combined_filt.h5ad) obtained from Professor Gottgens’s lab at University of Cambridge from publication doi: 10.1016/j.stem.2023.12.001 with associated raw sequencing data deposited on GEO under accession ID GSE207412. Filenames "Fig8a_Flt3Cre_Cyclo_analysis_240407.Rmd", "Fig8d_Tx_effect_analysis_240407.Rmd", "Fig8f_Tx_effect_analysis_240407.Rmd", and "ED_Fig8a_FltCre_sysmex_analysis_240407.Rmd": R Markdown codes for the mixed model used for Fig. 8a, Fig. 8d, Fig. 8f, and Exteded Data Fig. 8a, respectively, to evaluate the blood kinetics after challenges.
